mainHtml:
My name is Michał Kierzkowski. I am interested in cybersecurity, artificial intelligence, programming, and modern technology.

My interests also include astronomy, astrophysics, quantum physics, genetics, geography, geology, anthropology, cultural studies, linguistics, history, and music.

I have many interests because I am naturally curious about the world, and many different subjects can catch my attention.

This website is my personal space on the internet. It brings together my projects, games, creative work, and other things that I want to share in one place.
